modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Cable TV box cannot access a specific channel.

full_description_text:
- The cable TV box shows a message that the channel is not available.  
- It says the channel will be available shortly but never connects.  
- This issue happens when trying to watch a specific channel.
short_description: Cable TV box cannot access a specific channel.
description:

- This issue happens when trying to watch a specific channel.
